'''鈭歨-n-r-th''' ('''kahanrethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lallate|lallate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lallate|lallate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-n-r-th
|-
! Lemma
| kahanrethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihanrethoko|thihanrethoko]] || [[word:jihanrethoko|jihanrethoko]] || [[word:shihanrethoko|shihanrethoko]] || [[word:kihanrethoko|kihanrethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhanrethoko|thuthuhanrethoko]] || [[word:jujuhanrethoko|jujuhanrethoko]] || [[word:shushuhanrethoko|shushuhanrethoko]] || [[word:kukuhanrethoko|kukuhanrethoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhanrethoko|thuhanrethoko]] || [[word:juhanrethoko|juhanrethoko]] || [[word:shuhanrethoko|shuhanrethoko]] || [[word:kuhanrethoko|kuhanrethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehanrethoko|thehanrethoko]] || [[word:jehanrethoko|jehanrethoko]] || [[word:shehanrethoko|shehanrethoko]] || [[word:kehanrethoko|kehanrethoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohanrethoko|thohanrethoko]] || [[word:johanrethoko|johanrethoko]] || [[word:shohanrethoko|shohanrethoko]] || [[word:kohanrethoko|kohanrethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙hanrethoko|th忙hanrethoko]] || [[word:j忙hanrethoko|j忙hanrethoko]] || [[word:sh忙hanrethoko|sh忙hanrethoko]] || [[word:k忙hanrethoko|k忙hanrethoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahanrethoko|thahanrethoko]] || [[word:jahanrethoko|jahanrethoko]] || [[word:shahanrethoko|shahanrethoko]] || [[word:kahanrethoko|kahanrethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
